home.title: Secure any Data
home.subtitle: Keep sensitive info out of your chats and notes

api.unavailable: API service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

form.burnable_disabled_with_file: Burn after read is not available when a file is attached.
form.password_strength_weak: Short or simple passphrase — easy to guess if someone gets your link.
form.password_strength_fair: Reasonable length; adding mixed case, digits, or symbols helps.
form.password_strength_strong: Strong passphrase for this style of protection.
form.submit_empty: Add a message or attach a file

manage.headline: Your secret is live
manage.subtitle: Copy the link and send it through a channel you trust. Anyone with the link can open the secret until it expires.
manage.hint: Decrypt keys for this device live in this browser. You can review them later under Saved Secrets.
manage.not_found: We could not find that secret in this browser.

storage.title: Saved Secrets
storage.empty_hint: Decrypt keys you keep here will show up in this browser.
storage.on_device: Only decrypt keys are saved on this device

view.deleted_subtitle: This browser no longer stores the key for that link. You can close the tab when you are done.
view.not_found_subtitle: The secret is not on the server anymore. The URL may be wrong, or the secret may have expired or been destroyed after reading.
view.burn_confirm: Delete this secret from the server permanently? This cannot be undone.
view.image_preview_after_download: Download once to view — burn-after-read allows a single fetch.
